DASHBOARD.description: Hardware monitoring and AI backend status.

commands.get_backend_status: Verifies if the AI backend (Ollama, Kobold, or Cloud) is online and ready.
commands.get_full_dashboard: Returns a complete report of all hardware resources and AI backend status.
commands.get_gpu_status: Returns the video card (GPU) status, including VRAM usage and thermal/computational load.
commands.get_system_resources: Returns a summary of system CPU and RAM usage.

DOMOTICA.description: Smart Home control. Currently in integration phase.

commands.get_home_status: Provides a summary of the status of smart home devices (e.g., temperature, lights on).

commands.execute_shell: Executes a shell command in the system terminal and returns the output (max 500 characters).

FILE_MANAGER.description: System file and directory management with user path and file reading support.

commands.count_items: Counts the total number of files and folders in a given path, without listing them.
commands.list_files: SCANS and lists files/folders in a path to return the names to the AI.
commands.read_file: Reads the textual content of a file specified by the path.

HELP.description: Displays the list of all active commands and modules in the system.

commands.list_capabilities: Displays the complete list of all tools, modules, and capabilities currently loaded in the system.
commands.refresh_registry: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).

IMAGE_GEN.description: Generates images from text descriptions using AI image models.

commands.generate_image: Generates an image from a text description. Uses the configured provider.

commands.set_mute: Toggles system mute mode on or off.
commands.set_volume: Sets the system volume to a specific level.

MEMORY.description: Access to the Vault of memories and Admin profile (Identity and History).

commands.read_history: Extract the last N saved messages from the database history.
commands.remember_info: Save important information about the user in the biographical profile.
commands.reset_memory: Execute the Tabula Rasa protocol: clear the entire episodic chat history.
commands.who_am_i: Ask Zentra to retrieve identity data for the Admin and the AI (context profile).

MODELS.description: Changes the AI model based on the active backend (Ollama/Kobold).

commands.get_current_backend: Returns the AI backend currently in use (e.g., cloud, ollama, kobold).
commands.list_models: Lists all available models for the currently selected backend.
commands.set_model: Sets a new active AI model based on the numeric index obtained from list_models.

ROLEPLAY.description: Manages roleplay mode: loads characters and scenes for immersive conversations.

commands.list_characters: Lists all characters available for roleplaying.
commands.list_scenes: Lists all scenes available for roleplaying.
commands.load_character: Loads a character by name to interpret their role.
commands.load_scene: Loads a specific setting or scene for roleplaying.
commands.reset_roleplay: Complete reset of active characters and scenes.
commands.unload_character: Deactivates the current character and returns to the normal personality.
commands.unload_scene: Removes the current scene or setting.

SYSTEM.description: Root Access: terminal management, reboot, log diagnostics, system utilities.

commands.terminal: Opens a new system command prompt
commands.open:<name>: Starts a local program by name
commands.explore:<folder>: Opens folders like desktop or downloads
commands.shell:<command>: Executes shell commands and reads output

SYS_NET.description: Strumenti di rete avanzati: IP, Ping, Mappatura LAN, VPN/DNS.

commands.get_network_info: Runs ipconfig to extract local IPv4, Subnet, Default Gateway, and active DNS servers.
commands.get_public_ip: Interrogates an external service to find the current public outbound IP address.
commands.ping_test: Executes a network ping test to the specified target (IP or domain).
commands.reset_dns: Restores the DNS configuration of the active network adapter back to DHCP (automatic).
commands.scan_local_network: Executes an ARP scan ('arp -a') to discover active devices connected to the same LAN.
commands.set_dns_servers: Changes the DNS servers of the active network adapter to bypass ISP level blocking.

WEB.description: Network access for Google searches and quick opening of websites.

commands.search:<text>: Search for something on the internet (e.g. search:Rome weather)

WEBCAM.description: Access to PC optical vision to take snapshots of the environment or Admin.

commands.take_snapshot: Takes a photo using the computer's webcam and saves it to disk.

WEB_UI.description: Native Web Interface — Chat + Config Panel on localhost:7070

commands.get_panel_url: Returns the URL of the chat interface.
commands.open_browser: Opens the Zentra web interface in the default browser if not already open.
commands.set_state_manager: Injects the live StateManager from the main application.
